channel.title: Krea AI
channel.description: Krea AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Krea 2 LoRA training is now available
item.description: Train custom Krea 2 LoRAs — styles, characters, or objects — and use them in the Image tool. In beta for Max and Business subscribers.

item.title: Krea 2 deep dive: exploration, style references, and moodboards
item.description: Krea 2 is our first foundation model, built completely from scratch and focused on aesthetics and creative control.\ \ When you make an image with AI there are
